title: Tempting Australian Tofu Fried Rice Bites
description: A briny, crumbly, indulgent Australian dish featuring canola oil and lardons-render, made vegan-friendly with tofu, perfect for a satisfying snack. This dish combines the flavors of Australia with the convenience of a bite-sized snack.
instructions: Heat the canola oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lardons-render and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the crumbled tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked rice, soy sauce, sesame oil, scallions, salt, and pepper, and stir-fry until combined.
Using your hands, shape the rice mixture into small bite-sized balls.
Place the bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate the bites for at least 30 minutes to set.
Serve the Tempting Australian Tofu Fried Rice Bites chilled or at room temperature.
